title: Minimum Cost to Change the Final Value of Expression
titleCn: 反转表达式值的最少操作次数

testcases.input: expression = "1&(0|1)" Output: 1 Explanation: We can turn "1&(0|1)" into "1&(0&1)" by changing the '|' to a '&' using 1 operation. The new expression evaluates to 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We can turn "1&(0|1)" into "1&(0&1)" by changing the '|' to a '&' using 1 operation. The new expression evaluates to 0.

testcases.input: expression = "(0&0)&(0&0&0)" Output: 3 Explanation: We can turn "(0&0)&(0&0&0)" into "(0|1)|(0&0&0)" using 3 operations. The new expression evaluates to 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: We can turn "(0&0)&(0&0&0)" into "(0|1)|(0&0&0)" using 3 operations. The new expression evaluates to 1.

testcases.input: expression = "(0|(1|0&1))" Output: 1 Explanation: We can turn "(0|(1|0&1))" into "(0|(0|0&1))" using 1 operation. The new expression evaluates to 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We can turn "(0|(1|0&1))" into "(0|(0|0&1))" using 1 operation. The new expression evaluates to 0.
